name: American Classic Limousines
recent_news: No school-bus or student-transportation operations identified; appears to be a small limo/chauffeur business in the Fredericksburg, VA area. Website domain (amerclasslimo.com) resolves to an ACL Transportation page based in Wilmington, MA offering chauffeured limo/airport service only.
fit_notes: Not a fit for Summit. Limousine/chauffeur service with no evidence of school-bus or contracted student transportation; too small (5 employees, ~$411K rev) and wrong service mix.

name: Integrated Maintenance & Bus Services (IMBServ)
recent_news: Service-Disabled Veteran-Owned Small Business (SDVOSB) founded Dec 2018; federal contract awardee (VA medical transport contract via USAspending). Focus is NEMT ambulatory/wheelchair/gurney, shuttle buses, and long-distance routes — not K-12 school bus.
fit_notes: Weak fit. Independent SDVOSB but services are NEMT/ADA shuttle/federal contract work, not school-bus contracting. Possibly relevant only for special-needs/SPED adjacency in VA; very small scale.

name: Dutch Limousine Svc
recent_news: Listed at 4773 Durham Ct, Denver CO 80239 in business directories; no website found at dutchmountainarmory.com that matches (that domain appears unrelated). Cluster of small limo/airport-shuttle outfits at adjacent Durham Ct addresses suggests an independent owner-operator limo service, not a school-bus contractor.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Limousine service with no evidence of school-bus or student-transportation contracts; micro-scale (5 employees). Skip as tuck-in.

name: Jomo Transportation LLC
recent_news: Founded April 2014 by three founders inspired by NEMT access gap; expanded into group-home transport. NPI registered as Non-Emergency Medical Transport Van provider (NPI 1194279687). No K-12 school-district contracts identified.
fit_notes: Weak fit. Independent and founder-led but pure NEMT/group-home transport, not school-bus contracting. Could be tangential SPED/door-to-door adjacency in MA, but scale (~$400K rev, 5 employees) makes it sub-scale for Summit tuck-in.

name: People Care-Iers Inc
recent_news: Long-standing small handicapped-transportation service in Auburndale/Newton MA led by Shirley A. White; website appears hosted under bostonbus.com (www6 subdomain) suggesting a legacy/shared site. No M&A activity identified; no school-district school-bus contracts identified.
fit_notes: Marginal fit. Family-owned with likely succession need (long-tenured President), but service mix is handicapped paratransit, not school bus. Could be a micro special-needs adjacency in metro Boston; very small (5 employees, ~$399K rev) — likely too small for Summit unless bolted onto a larger MA tuck-in.
